title: stellaria palustris var. tenella
intro: Stellaria palustris var. tenella, also known as Dwarf Stitchwort or Small Stitchwort, is a small, delicate perennial plant belonging to the carnation family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing respiratory issues, relieving digestive problems, and providing antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Stellaria palustris var. tenella can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in treating a range of ailments.
